SendMessageResponse.SendMessageResult: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?><TransferMessage xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/messaging/v1"><Header><MessageType>TransferError</MessageType><TransferDate>2024-12-13T01:01:59.4104705+02:00</TransferDate><TransferGUID>241a88536aed4caabf47d22831e7ebda</TransferGUID></Header><Body><Error><TransferGUID>241a88536aed4caabf47d22831e7ebda</TransferGUID><ErrorDescription>Грешка при подателя.
